summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected. Closed listed PRs remain closed; open non-security PRs are kept independent because this shard cannot merge, fix, or close them and several still need proof or review cleanup. Security-sensitive refs surfaced by the hydrated artifact are routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
